Command.Name: parse
Command.Description: Parse log file and display entries in table format

Argument.Name: path
Argument.Description: Path to the log file to parse

Option.Description: Output in pipe-delimited format for embedded use (fastest)
Filter by log level (error, warn, info, debug)
REQUIRED: Log type - Installation, Update, Rabbit, IIS

Command.Name: analyze
Command.Description: Analyze log file and show status

Argument.Name: path
Argument.Description: Path to the log file to analyze

Option.Description: Output in structured format for embedded use
REQUIRED: Log type - installation, update, rabbit, iis
